overrides.expect: \begin{array}{l} \text {DEST = H} \\ \text {DEST = SOURCE} \\ \text {DEST = \overline {{H}}} \\ \text {DEST = \overline {{SOURCE}}} \\ \text {DEST = H + SOURCE} \\ \text {DEST = H + SOURCE + 1} \\ \text {DEST = H + 1} \\ \text {DEST = SOURCE + 1} \\ \text {DEST = SOURCE - H} \\ \text {DEST = SOURCE - 1} \\ \text {DEST = -H} \\ \text {DEST = H AND SOURCE} \\ \text {DEST = H OR SOURCE} \\ \text {DEST = 0} \\ \text {DEST = 1} \\ \text {DEST = -1} \end{array}
overrides.new: \begin{array}{l} \text {DEST = H} \\ \text {DEST = SOURCE} \\ \text {DEST = }\overline{H} \\ \text {DEST = }\overline{SOURCE} \\ \text {DEST = H + SOURCE} \\ \text {DEST = H + SOURCE + 1} \\ \text {DEST = H + 1} \\ \text {DEST = SOURCE + 1} \\ \text {DEST = SOURCE - H} \\ \text {DEST = SOURCE - 1} \\ \text {DEST = -H} \\ \text {DEST = H AND SOURCE} \\ \text {DEST = H OR SOURCE} \\ \text {DEST = 0} \\ \text {DEST = 1} \\ \text {DEST = -1} \end{array}
